style_property.title: Slider Width
style_property.description: Define the width of the slider

style_property.title: Border Radius
style_property.description: Set the border radius for the slider.

style_property.title: Container Box Shadow
style_property.description: Define the box shadow for the container.

style_property.title: Slider Container Margin Bottom
style_property.description: Set the margin to your content below the slider container.

style_property.title: Extra CSS
style_property.description: Inject CSS for Custom HTML as defined in template: 'vbResponsiveSlider_extra'. Must be defined as entire classes, CSS will export to your live site, regardless of settings.

style_property.title: Slide Height
style_property.description: Define the slide height for images.
